title: daemon jmap chat_changes returns all chats as created instead of cannotCalculateChanges
description: chat_changes handler (jmap.rs lines 807-815) returns all known chat IDs in the 'created' list when state differs, rather than returning a cannotCalculateChanges error as required by RFC 8620 §5.2. Clients that call Foo/changes expecting a delta will instead receive a full list disguised as newly-created objects, corrupting their local state by treating existing chats as new ones.
